title: Street Fighter 6/Version/1.07 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 1.07 Game Version 1.07 date September 24, 2024 Summary Terry Release. Minor balance changes and bug fixes. Links Patch Notes Terry Patch Terry released Universal Changes Drive Impact Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range (A.K.I., Chun-Li, Dee Jay, Kimberly, Luke) Fixed issues where absorbing an attack would affect the DI properties for some characters Blanka: proximity guard hitbox was shorter than usual, and the range on 2nd active frame was longer than usual Dee Jay: attack hitbox range became shorter than usual Kimberly: proximity guard hitbox would disappear on frames 1-17 Drive Reversal Expanded the throw hurtbox to ensure all characters can punish with a throw at close range Because some characters lacked strong punish options at -6 due to Light normal starter scaling, this gives a universal option for meterless damage and Drive gauge depletion Perfect Parry Fixed issue where, against specific projectile attacks with screen freeze properties, the player would incur the 10-frame recovery of a non-freeze Perfect Parry Applies to 2nd hit onward for JP's Stribog (236P) and Rashid's Arabian Cyclone (214P) Modern Controls Fixed issue where 20% shortcut scaling would apply to manually input special moves during a screen freeze (e.g. Super freeze) Assist Combos Fixed issues when entering Burnout during certain Assist Combos; using the same Assist Combo during the recovery or buffer window of the previous move would prevent the 2nd hit of the sequence from coming out Applies to Assist Combo 2 for Dhalsim, Juri, Luke, Kimberly, and Manon; Assist Combo 3 for JP, Juri, and Manon Key Character Changes A.K.I. Drive Impact Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range OD Serpent Lash (236PP) Now applies Punish Counter advantage to Toxic Blossom crumple (+9 before opponent becomes airborne) Akuma Gou Hadoken (236P) Fixed issue where regular projectiles could be performed while an OD projectile was still on-screen Blanka Drive Impact Fixed issue where absorbing an attack caused the proximity guard hitbox range to be shorter than usual, and the 2nd active frame hitbox to be longer than usual OD Electric Thunder (214PP during SA2) Fixed issue that would cause an activated Blanka-chan doll to detonate with standard projectile priority rather than OD priority Chun-Li Drive Impact Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range OD Kikoken (Modern [4]6XX) Fixed issue where performing the manual input with Modern controls resulted in a regular Kikoken if any Down input was also used HK Tensho Kicks (22HK) Increased knockdown time on the 1st hit (less likely to be punished if the opponent falls out between hits) Dee Jay Face Breaker (4HK) Collision box changed to make OD Jus Cool juggles more consistent (specials should no longer come out in the wrong direction) Threebeat Combo 1 (5LP~MK) Reduced pushback on hit (keeps Dee Jay closer for the 3rd hit of the Target Combo for a strike/throw mixup) Recovery increased 18 → 20 Hitstun increased 23 → 25 and Blockstun increased 18 → 20 (no change to overall advantage) Hitconfirm window is 2f more lenient, making it possible to confirm a successful MK after blocked 5LP Now applies 20% Starter scaling (e.g. blocked 5LP that frame traps into MK) No longer forces stand on hit Threebeat Combo 2 (5LP~MK~MK) Recovery decreased 21 → 19 Hitstun decreased 27 → 25 and Blockstun decreased 16 → 14 (no change to overall advantage) Hitstop increased 9 → 11 (keeps the timing consistent for both players after the final hit despite the hitstun/blockstun changes) Drive Impact Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range Fixed issue where absorbing an attack caused the attack hitbox range to be shorter than usual Jackknife Maximum ([2]8K) Initial hitbox expanded downward for consistency against moves with low-profile landing recovery (e.g. Juri's j.214K) Waning Moon (214K~MK) Drive Damage on Block increased 4000 → 6000 Punish Counter now causes a ground bounce 30% Starter scaling applied OD Waning Moon (214KK~MK) Now causes ground bounce vs. airborne opponents (can juggle into Supers) SA1 (236236K) Juggle Limit increased 13 → 19 Now causes a sliding Hard Knockdown vs. airborne opponents Dhalsim Assist Combo 2 With less than 2 bars of Super Gauge, changed to 4MK ~ 63214PP ~ 2HK 5MP Hit Advantage increased -2 → 0 5HK Punish Counter Advantage increased +21 → +24 j.MP The tip of the arm hurtbox can no longer be hit by cross-up attacks Nirvana Punch (1HP) Reduced knockback vs. airborne opponents, allowing for stronger juggle routes Charged Yoga Fire (236[P]) Block Advantage increased -3 → -1 The start of the transition from regular to charged version delayed 5f → 7f (can hold the button longer without accidentally slowing down the uncharged fireball) OD Yoga Fire (236PP) 1st hit deals more hitstun and less pushback, ensuring both will combo Reduced body hurtbox during startup and recovery OD Yoga Flame (63214PP) Expanded the attack hitbox of 1st hit Expanded the combo-only hitboxes of 2nd hit onward when the 1st hit connects OD Yoga Comet (j.63214PP) Fixed issue where if the opponent Perfect Parried the projectile, they would incur Perfect Parry scaling until Dhalsim landed (even when he could act while mid-air) SA1 (236236P) Now deals 792 recoverable gray damage on block, and Drive Damage on Block increased 2520 → 5040 Deals 492 Chip damage + 300 recoverable gray damage vs. Burnout LP/MP version Recovery decreased 20f → 15f; Block Advantage -15 → -10 with increased pushback (usually safe if spaced) These changes give Dhalsim a way to safely buffer SA1 in neutral while chipping away at the opponent's health/Drive gauge if blocked HP version hurtbox is now crouching height until 3rd active frame (better anti-air) Ed 5HK Blockstun increased 18 → 19 Block Advantage increased +3 → +4 DR Cancel Block Advantage increased +7 → +8 Mostly relevant when forcing the opponent to stand block after a deep jump-in, since the move is crouchable j.HP Active Frames increased 4 → 5, making it easier to time as a jump-in j.HK Floats the opponent higher as an air-to-air and causes Ed to descend more quickly, making follow-up juggles much easier LP Psycho Blitz (214LP) Increased pushback when blocked in the corner, making punish routes potentially more restrictive LK Psycho Flicker (236LK) Punish Counter juggle follow-up timing is 1 frame more lenient SA2 (214214P) Now applies 20% scaling on Super gauge build until the end of the combo E. Honda SA2 ([4]646K) Adjusted the pushback of the initial headbutt and the hitbox of the slap animation so that the opponent is less likely to fall out mid-combo Increased knockdown time of the initial headbutt so that he is no longer punishable if the rest of the Super whiffs Guile Sonic Boom ([4]6P) Reduced Super and Drive gauge build LP/HP versions: Super Art gain 600 → 300, Drive gain 1000 → 500 MP version: Super Art gain 600 → 450, Drive gain 1000 → 500 Jamie SA1 (236236K) Fixed issue where the damage would increase when the 1st or 2nd hit landed as a Counter-hit JP 5MK Hitstun increased 23 → 25 Hit Advantage increased +1 → +3 DR Cancel Hit Advantage increased +11 → +13 Improved combo routes, particularly when canceled into SA2 2HP Arm hurtbox is anti-air invuln from 2nd active frame onward (mostly reverted the nerf from Version 1.04) Bylina (6HK) Increased Juggle Limit; reduced the Juggle Increase value on 1st hit Triglav (22P) On a grounded hit, reduced the upward launch by 1 frame and extended the knockdown time by 1 frame No change to the total knockdown advantage Stribog (236P/PP) 2nd hit has more range when 1st hit connects, ensuring both hits will reach Torbalan (236K/KK) Removed projectile collision box after the active frames have ended Embrace (214K/KK) Immediate scaling reduced from 25% → 10% when comboed into Juri Assist Combo 2 With less than 1 bar of Super Gauge, changed to 2MP ~ 214KK ~ 623HP Kimberly Drive Impact Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range Fixed issue where absorbing an attack caused the proximity guard hitbox to disappear on frames 1-17 Shuriken Bomb (22P) Damage scaling reduced from 20% Starter/Combo scaling to 10% Starter scaling only Luke 2LP / 2LK Reduced pushback on hit and block 2MP Reduced pushback on block Can now pressure with blocked DR~2MP into 2LK~2LP to frame trap and punish back walk Outlaw Kick (4HK) Retains more Drive Rush momentum for combo consistency Triple Impact (5LP~MP~HP) Removed 10% immediate scaling on MP Increased base damage on HP 600 → 800 Drive Impact Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range M. Bison Fixed issue where Psycho Mine could remain embedded after detonation, allowing two activations in one combo Applied to OD Psycho Crusher Attack and Regular/OD Devil Reverse Drive Reversal Reduced horizontal range of the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox Double Knee Press (236K) Reduced pushback on block and reduced the recovery hurtbox width by the same amount No real change to the punishable ranges, but follow-up combos are more consistent when a punish does connect This also makes it harder for M. Bison to set up a spacing trap afterwards Fixed issue where if only the 1st hit connected, M. Bison would incur 5f extra whiff recovery that was intended for a fully-whiffed version Psycho Crusher Attack ([4]6P/PP) Fixed issue where the hurtbox after passing through the opponent was different while in Burnout Psycho Crusher Attack + Psycho Mine ([4]6P + Mine) Can now only be canceled into SA3 after connecting with the opponent This fixes an issue where after colliding with a projectile, the Psycho Crusher would whiff along with the SA3 Now must connect with the opponent before the SA3 cancel can occur Fixed issue where the attack would be canceled mid-animation if it collided with a projectile after hitting the opponent OD Psycho Crusher Attack + Psycho Mine ([4]6PP + Mine) After the first 2 attacks are Perfect Parried, the 3rd hit will only trigger a Mine detonation on hit Fixed issue where extra combo scaling was applied to follow-ups when only this 3rd hit connected Backfist Combo + Psycho Mine (214P + Mine) Fixed issue where the Mine would detonate when the first hit was Perfect Parried and the 2nd hit whiffed OD Backfist Combo + Psycho Mine (214PP + Mine) Detonation occurs 2 frames later and tweaked the hitstun/blockstun properties (less likely to whiff when the opponent is launched high on the screen) Fixed issue where the Mine would detonate when any hit was Perfect Parried and later hits whiffed The Mine will still detonate after a Perfect Parry if any later hits connect on hit, block, parry, or armor OD Devil Reverse / Devil Reverse + Psycho Mine ([2]8K~PP or [2]8K~P/PP + Mine) Expanded collision box downward after the 1st hit connects Fixed issue that caused later hits to occur on the wrong side of the opponent SA1 (236236K) Fixed issue where the timer would not stop during the attack SA2 (214214K) Fixed issue that caused the timer to stop for longer than intended after the cinematic on hit This also affects other elements like Drive Gauge recovery Fixed training mode bug that prevented wake-up reversals from coming out after the cinematic Manon Assist Combo 2 With less than 1 bar of Super Gauge, changed to 5MK ~ 236KK ~ 214MK Marisa Hurtbox (during Ground Bounce) Changed to match other large characters for juggle consistency Rashid Backdash Fixed issue where Rashid's collision box was smaller on frames 1-15 2LP Added a head hurtbox on frames 1-7 that is vulnerable only to air attacks (preventing its use as an anti-air) Nail Assault (Modern Controls: 214X~6X~6X) Input adjusted to require holding forward for the final attack in order to prevent overlap issues Now easier to perform Assault Roll into an immediate attack Assist Combo 2 In Burnout, changed to 5MP~HK ~ 214HP~6X~6X Ryu Denjin Hashogeki (D.214HP) Fixed issue where a regular HP Hashogeki would come out if performed while a Hadoken was on-screen Zangief Knee Hammer (6MK) Blockstun reduced 17 → 16 Block Advantage decreased -3(+3) → -4(+2) Extends a wider body hurtbox from frame 2 onward (no change to leg hurtbox) Adjusted Zangief's center axis on frames 2-6 to match visuals more closely Headbutt (6HP) Hitstun increased 27 → 28 Hit Advantage increased +7 → +8 DR Cancel Hit Advantage increased +15 → +16 Now incurs 25% Starter scaling and 2-hit Combo scaling

  • Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range (A.K.I., Chun-Li, Dee Jay, Kimberly, Luke)
